# M8 AI Capability Quick Guide (Generated Projection)

<!-- DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE MANUALLY. Generated by scripts/generate_portable_catalog.py -->

- **Canonical Capability Catalog SHA-256**: `3bb0d8508d2b33353cd5a53c40811d68d9adedd5cfce1f007970821469e24f8f`

Use this guide to verify the supported capabilities and limits when composing Unified Requests.

## 1. Supported Data Needs

| Capability ID | Description | Supported Markets | Execution Gate |
|---|---|---|---|
| `identity` | Retrieves the canonical security identity. | TWSE, TPEX, TAIFEX | Direct (No Approval) |
| `current_observation` | Retrieves the latest available market data snapshot. Not guaranteed to be realtime. | TWSE, TPEX | Approval Required |
| `official_eod_reference` | Retrieves the official End of Day reference data. | TWSE, TPEX | Approval Required |
| `session_status` | Retrieves the market session status, local clock and closure states. | TWSE, TPEX | Approval Required |
| `recent_performance` | Retrieves descriptive performance metrics over a specified lookback period. | TWSE, TPEX | Approval Required |
| `source_currentness` | Retrieves the metadata concerning the retrieval timestamp, effective trade date, and timing class. | TWSE, TPEX, TAIFEX | Direct (No Approval) |
| `evidence_quality` | Retrieves details on data coverage, partial results, and available fallbacks. | TWSE, TPEX, TAIFEX | Direct (No Approval) |

## 2. Market Support Status

- **TWSE**: `supported`
- **TPEX**: `supported_with_caveats`
- **TAIFEX**: `provisional`

## 3. System Execution & Bounds Constraints

- **Default Target Limit**: `10` securities
- **Hard Target Limit**: `50` securities
- **Default Operation Limit**: `30` operations
- **Hard Operation Limit**: `100` operations
- **Preview Supported**: `True`
- **One-Shot Execution**: `True`
